# tests/fixtures/bypass-record/record-complete.txt
#
# A complete bypass record under the default must_record: [actor, reason]
# (policy.yml) — both fields present and non-empty. '#' comment lines and
# blank lines are ignored by check-bypass-record.sh, same convention as
# check-docs-required.sh's --changed-files list.

actor: alice
reason: prod registry outage; gate infrastructure itself unreachable, verified via status page
